subject: Question about Assignment 2 deadline
body:
Hi Dr. Jadidi,

I am writing to ask about the deadline for Assignment 2. I noticed it was mentioned in the lecture but I wanted to confirm the exact date and time.

Also, could you clarify if the submission is due at 11:59 PM or midnight?

Thank you,
Alex Chen

subject: Urgent: Cannot access exam marks
body:
Dear Dr. Jadidi,

I am unable to access my exam marks on the student portal. I have tried multiple times but keep getting an error message.

This is quite urgent as I need my marks for a scholarship application deadline tomorrow.

Could you please help me resolve this issue as soon as possible?

Kind regards,
Sarah Johnson

subject: Workshop attendance confirmation
body:
Dear Staff,

This is a reminder that the ICT Department workshop scheduled for next Thursday has been confirmed.

Room: Building G, Room 101
Time: 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Please confirm your attendance by replying to this email.

Best regards,
ICT Administration

subject: Request for extension on Assignment 3
body:
Dear Dr. Jadidi,

I am writing to request an extension on Assignment 3. I have been experiencing some health issues that have affected my ability to work on the assignment.

I have attached a medical certificate as supporting documentation.

Would it be possible to get an extension until next Friday?

Thank you for your understanding.

Michael Park

subject: Feedback on lecture content
body:
Hi Dr. Jadidi,

I wanted to provide some feedback on last week's lecture on network security. I found the section on encryption protocols particularly helpful.

However, I think it would be beneficial to have more practical examples in the next lecture.

Overall, great job with the teaching!

Best,
Jennifer

subject: Exam format question
body:
Hello,

Can you please tell me what format the upcoming exam will be in? Will it be multiple choice, short answer, or essay style?

Also, will we be allowed to bring any notes or calculators?

Thanks,
David

subject: RE: RE: Quick question
body:
Hi Dr. Jadidi,

I'm following up on my previous email about accessing the course materials. The issue is that I cannot find the reading list for Week 7.

Could you please check if it has been uploaded?

Thank you,
Amanda

subject: Meeting request - thesis discussion
body:
Dear Dr. Jadidi,

I would like to schedule a meeting to discuss my thesis progress. Would you be available sometime next week?

I am free on Monday afternoon, Tuesday morning, or Wednesday any time.

Please let me know what works best for you.

Best regards,
Robert Zhang

subject: Library resources for cybersecurity research
body:
Dear Faculty,

We are pleased to announce that the library has acquired new database subscriptions relevant to cybersecurity research.

These include:
- IEEE Security & Privacy Archive
- ACM Digital Library - Security Collection
- National Vulnerability Database access

You can access these resources through the library website using your staff login.

Best,
Library Services

subject: Complaint about group project teammate
body:
Dear Dr. Jadidi,

I am having issues with my group project teammate. They have not been contributing to the project and are not responding to our messages.

We have a deadline coming up and I am concerned we will not be able to submit on time.

What options do I have in this situation?

Thank you,
Emily Brown
